title: Projects
subtitle: Manage your client projects and track their visibility
errorLoad: Failed to load projects. Please try again.
emptyState: No projects yet. Create your first one to get started.
deleteConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete the project along with all its queries, runs, scores, and content. This action cannot be undone.
emptyDescription: Create your first project to start tracking AI visibility for your brand or clients.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by project, client, domain, or description
filters.emptyDescription: Adjust the search or sort controls to find the project you need.

projectEditor.title: Edit Project
projectEditor.description: Update the project details shown across the workspace.

placeholders.name: Acme visibility program
placeholders.description: What this project tracks and why it exists.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Pack
knowledge.description: All brand intelligence, products, competitors, and curated entries for this project.
knowledge.overviewDescription: Brand profile, products, competitors, and extracted knowledge entries.
knowledge.loadError: Could not load this project's knowledge pack.
knowledge.createPackDescription: This project does not have a brand knowledge pack yet. Create it from the project details first, then you can add manual notes and upload source files.
knowledge.createPackError: Could not create the knowledge pack.
knowledge.entriesDescription: High-signal facts, FAQs, claims, and proof points that the product can rely on.
knowledge.emptyDescription: Add a manual note or upload supporting files to start grounding answers and content.
knowledge.editorDescription: Use manual entries for facts you want immediately available in prompts and generated content.

placeholders.content: Add a precise fact, FAQ, claim, or differentiator.

knowledge.createError: Could not add the knowledge entry.
knowledge.updateError: Could not update the knowledge entry.
knowledge.deleteError: Could not delete the knowledge entry.
knowledge.filesDescription: Upload docs, briefs, one-pagers, or transcripts to keep project context in one place.
knowledge.uploadError: Could not upload the selected files.
knowledge.confirmDeleteFile: Delete this file from the knowledge pack?
knowledge.crawlDescription: Import knowledge entries from your website automatically.
knowledge.crawlSuccess: Crawl complete: {{entries}} entries extracted from {{pages}} pages.
knowledge.crawlNoEntries: Crawled {{pages}} pages but no knowledge could be extracted. Check AI key settings or add entries manually.
knowledge.crawlPartialError: {{entries}} entries extracted from {{pages}} pages ({{errors}} pages failed extraction).
knowledge.crawlError: Website crawl failed. Please check the URL and try again.

workflow.title: Next Steps
workflow.description: After onboarding, this is the fastest path to getting real visibility data into the project.

createSet.title: Create a query set
createSet.description: Open Query Management and create the first set you want to use for this brand.

addQueries.title: Populate the set
addQueries.description: Generate queries with AI or add them manually, then review what should stay in scope.

runEngines.title: Start an engine run
runEngines.description: Use the Runs tab to execute the set against one or more AI engines.

createFlow.title: New project
createFlow.subtitle: Enter a name and website. We will run an SEO site audit and start visibility analytics automatically.
createFlow.invalidUrl: Enter a valid website URL (e.g. example.com).
createFlow.auditStarted: SEO audit and visibility analytics started.
createFlow.visibilityAnalyticsFailed: SEO audit started, but visibility analytics could not be launched. Use “Run analytics again” on the project.
createFlow.createFailed: Could not create the project or start the audit. Try again.

visibilityAnalytics.bannerRunningBody: We’re querying AI engines about your brand. This usually takes 1–3 minutes.
visibilityAnalytics.bannerStartingBody: Preparing engines and your default query set.
visibilityAnalytics.bannerSuccessBody: Open the Visibility tab to see scores and trends.
visibilityAnalytics.rerunFailed: Could not start analytics. Try again in a moment.

siteAudit.pageSubtitle: Technical, schema, content & platform readiness — plus AI citability.
siteAudit.recommendationsHint: Prioritised actions to improve your SEO score.
siteAudit.emptyStateBody: Run a full SEO site audit to measure your AI citability, technical health, structured data, and platform readiness.
siteAudit.runningHint: A full SEO audit usually takes about 10–25 minutes; large or slow sites can take longer. You can leave this page — we keep checking until it finishes.

analysisProgress.title: Analyzing your project…
analysisProgress.subtitle: Setting up visibility tracking for {{name}}
analysisProgress.hint: This usually takes a few seconds
